# G3 Pass Fixture

## Pre-mortem

Imagine the project has failed. What went wrong?

1. Scope grew unchecked; early warning: backlog size doubles; counter: weekly scope review gate.
2. Key person left the team; early warning: absence patterns; counter: cross-training program.
3. External API dependency changed without notice; early warning: provider changelog alerts; counter: contract SLA with vendor.
4. Budget cut mid-project; early warning: budget forecast divergence; counter: reserve fund allocation.
5. Integration testing found late-stage incompatibilities; early warning: integration smoke tests fail in CI; counter: continuous integration from week 1.
